info.description: API untuk aplikasi hafalan Al-Quran dan Kitab
info.title: Hifzhun API

get.description: Get all pending book update requests

post.description: Approve a pending book update request
Reject a pending book update request

get.description: Get all books pending for approval
Get any user's book detail with modules and items (Admin only)

delete.description: Delete a published book and all its modules/items

post.description: Approve a pending book for publishing
Reject a pending book

get.description: Get all pending teacher requests
Admin gets count of pending, approved, and rejected teacher requests

post.description: Approve a pending teacher request
Reject a pending teacher request

get.description: Get all users, optionally filtered by role

post.description: Activate a user account
Deactivate a user account
Authenticate user and return JWT token
Register a new user account as student

get.description: Get all books owned by the user

post.description: Create a new book (draft status)
Add a new item to a book module

get.description: Get all published books added to user's collection (read-only books from other users)

delete.description: Remove a book from user's collection (deletes all memorization items from that book)

get.description: Get all published/approved books
Get book detail for a book that must be in published status

post.description: Create Item rows for each BookItem in the published book (preparing user memorization items)
post.summary: Add a published book into my book items

post.description: Copy published book structure (modules & items) into a new draft owned by the user
post.summary: Copy published book to my draft

post.description: Upload a cover image (jpg/jpeg/png). Auto-resized if > 3MB. Returns the file path to use as cover_image.
Add a new item directly to a book
Add a new module to a book

get.description: Get book detail with modules and items. Class-assigned books are accessible to students who joined a class containing the book.

put.description: Update book title, description, or cover image

delete.description: Delete a book and all its modules/items

post.description: User starts memorizing a specific item from a book. For class-assigned books, only students who joined a class containing the book can start its items.
Submit book for admin approval. Set is_editable=true to allow users who import/copy this book to edit items and modules; false to make it read-only for them.
Request an update for a published book (requires admin approval)

get.description: Get hierarchical modules (with items) for a book. Class-assigned books are accessible to students who joined a class containing the book.
Get all update requests for a book
Get all classes owned by the teacher

post.description: Teacher creates a new class (quran or book type)
Student joins a class using class code

get.description: Get all classes the student has joined
Get class detail with members and books

put.description: Update class name, description, or active status

delete.description: Delete a class and all its members/books

get.description: Get all books in a book-type class. Teacher and students who joined the class can access this endpoint.

post.description: Add a book to book-type class (teacher only)

delete.description: Remove a book from class (teacher only)

get.description: Teacher gets all Quran items pending graduation approval in a class. Only items created in juz with this class_id are returned.

post.description: Teacher approves an item for graduation. The item must belong to a student in this Quran class and be created in a juz with this class_id.
Teacher rejects an item for graduation (returns to fsrs_active). The item must belong to this Quran class scope.

get.description: Get all members of a class (teacher only)
Get progress of all students for class-scoped items. Quran classes use juz created with class_id; book classes use books assigned to the class.

post.description: Generate daily tasks for today

get.description: Get all daily tasks for today

post.description: Decide to graduate, freeze, or reactivate an item

get.description: Get all items filtered by status
Get items that have reached their interval deadline
Get detailed information for an item, with book/juz enrichment

post.description: Move item from interval to fsrs_active phase (user decision). For class book items, only students who joined a class containing the book can activate FSRS.
Move book item from fsrs_active to inactive status. Only for non-quran items. Accepts item_id from items table or book_items table.

parameters.description: Item ID (from items or book_items table)
parameters.name: item_id

patch.description: Change interval_days and set next interval review to now + interval_days (00:00)
patch.summary: Update interval days for interval phase

get.description: Get average rating and performance label for an item's interval reviews

post.description: Move book item from inactive back to fsrs_active status. Only for non-quran items. Accepts item_id from items table or book_items table.

parameters.description: Item ID (from items or book_items table)
parameters.name: item_id

post.description: Submit a review rating for a hafalan item. Class book items can only be reviewed by students who joined a class containing the book.
Submit a review rating for an item during interval phase (1=bad, 2=good, 3=perfect)
post.summary: Review an item in interval phase

post.description: Move item from menghafal to interval phase with recurring review

get.description: Get all juz entries with counts per status. Send class_id to return only juz created inside that Quran class.
get.summary: Get my juz list with item status counts

post.description: Create a new juz entry for Quran memorization. Send class_id to create the juz inside a joined Quran class scope.

parameters.description: Class ID for class-scoped Quran juz
parameters.name: class_id

post.description: Mengaktifkan juz tertentu agar masuk antrian review graduate
Menonaktifkan juz tertentu agar dilewati dalam antrian review graduate
Menandai juz sebagai selesai (done)
Membatalkan status selesai (done) pada juz
Add a new hafalan item (surah verses or page) to a juz

get.description: Get items selected for today's review session
Get all user's memorization items grouped by juz (quran) or book. Send class_id with type=quran to return only Quran items created inside that class.

parameters.description: Filter by type: quran or book
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Filter Quran items by class-scoped juz
parameters.name: class_id

post.description: Submit a request to become a teacher

get.description: Get the current user's teacher request status

is_editable.description:
IsEditable controls whether users who import/copy this published book
can add, edit, or delete items and modules on their own copy.
true  = importers can freely edit their copy
false = importers cannot modify items/modules (read-only for them)

estimated_review_seconds.description: Estimasi waktu review (detik) opsional untuk item buku.

estimatedReviewSeconds.description: Estimated time per review (in seconds) for this item, optional

fsrsstartAt.description: FSRS start time: when item entered fsrs_active phase (day 1)

intervalEndAt.description: Legacy: deadline for interval (kept for compatibility)

message.example: Saya ingin menjadi guru di platform ini

is_editable.description:
IsEditable controls whether users who import/copy this published book
can add, edit, or delete items and modules on their own copy.
true  = importers can freely edit their copy
false = importers cannot modify items/modules (read-only for them)

estimated_review_seconds.description: Estimasi waktu review (detik) opsional untuk item buku.

stability.description: "item belum masuk ujian" or days until next review

services.ItemDetail.description: Detail of a single class-scoped item including its current phase/status

interval_end_at.description: When interval will end (only for interval phase)

next_review_at.description: Next review date (only for fsrs_active phase)

stability.description: FSRS stability score (only for fsrs_active phase)

status.description: Current status/phase: menghafal, interval, fsrs_active, graduate

services.MemberInfo.description: Basic information about a student who joined the class

joined_at.description: Date and time when the member joined the class

services.PendingGraduation.description: Item pending teacher approval for graduation

services.StudentProgress.description: Progress data for a student in a class, showing class-scoped item statistics and item details

fsrs_active.description: Number of items in 'fsrs_active' status (actively being reviewed with FSRS algorithm)

graduate.description: Number of items in 'graduate' status (mastered/completed memorization)

inactive.description: Number of book items in 'inactive' status

interval.description: Number of items in 'interval' status (waiting for interval period to complete)

items.description: Detailed list of all hafalan items with their current status

menghafal.description: Number of items in 'menghafal' status (currently memorizing)

pending_graduate.description: Number of items in 'pending_graduate' status (waiting for teacher approval)

start.description: Number of book items in 'start' status

total_items.description: Total number of hafalan items the student has

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
